summary: Comprehensive testing of Cardology, Mayan Astrology, Guided Experience, and Navigation features. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None required - all endpoints work without seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cardology, Mayan Astrology, and Guided Experience features fully tested. Navigation 'More' dropdown contains Cardology and Mayan links. Guided Experience button appears on Tantra and Mudras pages in the practice detail view (under 'How to Practice' tab for Mudras).

cardology_page.page_loads: Cardology page (/cardology) loads with 'Sacred Cardology - Cards of Life & Love' header
cardology_page.three_tabs: All 3 tabs present: Birth Card, Daily Card, Love Match

cardology_birth_card.result_display: Shows card visual with title, keyword, element, planet, love & life readings

cardology_daily_card.result_display: Shows card with title, keyword, element, planet, suit, love message

cardology_compatibility.form_fields: Two sets of month/day selects for Person 1 and Person 2
cardology_compatibility.result_display: data-testid='compatibility-result' shows score percentage and both cards

mayan_page.page_loads: Mayan Astrology page (/mayan) loads with 'Tzolk'in - The Sacred Calendar' header
mayan_page.three_tabs: All 3 tabs present: Birth Sign, Today's Energy, Compatibility

mayan_birth_sign.form_fields: Month, Day selects and Year input (data-testid='mayan-month', 'mayan-day', 'mayan-year')
mayan_birth_sign.result_display: Shows galactic signature, glyph visual, kin number, sign details, tone, element, direction, shadow, affirmation

mayan_today.result_display: Shows galactic signature with full sign and tone details

mayan_compatibility.form_fields: Two sets of month/day/year inputs for Person 1 and Person 2
mayan_compatibility.result_display: data-testid='mayan-compat-result' shows galactic resonance score and both signatures

guided_experience.tantra_page: Guided Meditation button (data-testid='launch-guided-experience') present in practice detail view
guided_experience.mudras_page: Guided Meditation button present in 'How to Practice' tab of mudra detail modal
guided_experience.quick_narration: Quick Narration button also present alongside Guided Meditation

navigation.more_dropdown: More dropdown in navigation contains Cardology and Mayan links

users_discover.endpoint_works: GET /api/users/discover returns paginated list of users

backend_apis_tested: GET /api/cardology/birth-card?month=5&day=12 - 200 (returns card with title, keyword, element, suit, planet, love, life)
GET /api/mayan/today - 200 (returns today's Mayan energy with date)
GET /api/mayan/compatibility - 200 (returns score, messages, both persons' signs)
POST /api/guided-experience/generate with auth - 200 (returns segments with text, duration, cue, intensity)
frontend_ui_tested: Cardology page loads at /cardology with 3 tabs
Cardology Birth Card: select month/day, click Reveal, shows card visual with all details
Cardology Daily Card: click Draw Today's Card, shows card with guidance
Cardology Compatibility: enter two birthdates, shows score percentage and card comparison
Mayan Astrology page loads at /mayan with 3 tabs
Mayan Birth Sign: enter month/day/year, click Decode, shows galactic signature with all details
Mayan Today's Energy: click Reveal, shows today's Mayan energy
Mayan Compatibility: form present with all fields
Tantra page shows 'Guided Meditation' button in practice detail view
Mudras page shows 'Guided Meditation' button in 'How to Practice' tab
Navigation 'More' dropdown contains Cardology and Mayan links
